User Satisfaction

About Health Adviser

Health Adviser is a secure digital health management platform built to simplify everyday healthcare tracking. We combine intelligent data analysis, structured health monitoring tools, and easy-to-use interfaces to help individuals make better health decisions.

From uploading prescriptions to monitoring blood pressure trends, our platform centralizes your health data in one clean, organized dashboard.

Core Features

📊 Blood Pressure Tracking

Record systolic, diastolic, and pulse values. View weekly trends and detect potential hypertension patterns early.

📁 Prescription Management

Upload scanned prescriptions or enter them manually. Keep your medication history securely organized.

⏰ Smart Medicine Reminders

Set scheduled medication reminders to improve treatment adherence and reduce missed doses.

🤖 AI-Powered Health Plans

Get personalized diet and workout recommendations based on BMI, medical history, and known conditions.

How It Works

  1. Create your secure account and complete your health profile.
  2. Upload prescriptions or enter medication details manually.
  3. Track vital metrics like blood pressure regularly.
  4. Set reminders to ensure consistent medication usage.
  5. Receive AI insights tailored to your health data.

What Our Users Say

“Health Adviser helped me stay consistent with my blood pressure tracking. The weekly comparison view makes everything easy to understand.”

— Priya M., Pune

“The medication reminders reduced my missed doses completely. It’s simple and extremely helpful.”

— Rahul K., Mumbai

Security & Privacy

Your medical data is sensitive — and we treat it that way. Health Adviser uses secure authentication, protected database access, and controlled storage practices to safeguard your information.

  • 🔐 Encrypted login sessions
  • 🛡 Secure file storage
  • 🔒 Private user-level data isolation

Frequently Asked Questions

Is Health Adviser free?

Yes, core features are available for free.

Can I upload multiple prescriptions?

Yes, you can store unlimited prescriptions securely.

Is my health data shared?

No. Your data remains private and is never shared without your consent.
